sections.paragraph:
Original: ירדּן

Transliteration: yardên

Phonetic: yar-dane'

BDB Definition:

Jordan = "descender"
  1. the river of Palestine running from the roots of Anti-Lebanon to the Dead Sea a distance of approx 200 miles (320 kilometers)

Origin: from H3381

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name
